title: Manage a Busy Inbox
drDigitalIntro:
You've inherited a messy inbox with 20 unread emails.
• Read them, reply to a few, and forward one to a colleague.
• Attach a document, and delete the spam.
• Spot the phishing email and avoid it — just like real life.
drDigitalSuccess: You can manage a complex email inbox like a professional!
drDigitalHint: Start by scanning subjects to find the important emails.
